name: Sarah Lindqvist
title: Head of Air Freight
memory_summary: Hit twice last quarter by Red Sea diversions — expressed urgency around emergency capacity. Quoted but moved away on price.

name: Marco Bianchi
title: Chartering Manager
memory_summary: Lost a Saudi automotive lane to delays in March. Open to backup brokers but won't talk until they see proof.

name: Anika Hofstetter
title: Operations Manager Air Freight
memory_summary: Mid-size forwarder, mostly EU lanes. Curious about charter as a service but no urgent demand.

name: Pierre Lacombe
title: Project Cargo Manager
memory_summary: Won a wind turbine project mid-March, needed urgent AN-124 capacity. Said our quote was 12% better than DSV — closing.

name: Olivia Kowalska
title: Air Freight Manager
memory_summary: Talking to 2 other charter brokers. Wants pricing transparency upfront — said our deck was clearest.

name: Daniel Whitaker
title: Head of Air Freight
memory_summary: UK forwarder with strong India lane exposure. Mentioned the recent Mumbai customs slowdown is killing them.

name: Ines Garcia
title: Sea & Air Freight Manager
memory_summary: Heavy sea-freight book, dipping toes into air for time-critical pharma. Listening mode.

name: Lukas Müller
title: Chartering Manager
memory_summary: Pushed to HubSpot last week — already in pipeline as a B2 deal worth ~180k EUR.

name: Femke de Vries
title: Operations Manager Air Freight
memory_summary: Mid-sized NL forwarder, growing. Hasn't done charter before but signals open mindset.

name: Henrik Andersen
title: Head of Air Freight
memory_summary: Said exclusively works with Hellmann — no interest in switching. Asked us not to call again for 6mo.

name: Sofia Romano
title: Project Cargo Manager
memory_summary: Just won a renewable energy installation project in Sicily — needs heavy-lift air charter for transformer components.

name: Pieter Janssen
title: Air Freight Manager
memory_summary: Asked us to call back in 2 weeks — was in middle of a tender response when we caught him.

name: Jordan Sloane
title: CEO
memory_summary: Just closed Series A (14M USD). Looking for sales tooling that doesn't require enterprise sales motion.

name: Maya Iyer
title: Founder
memory_summary: Solo founder + 3 engineers. Asked specifically about agent orchestration patterns and how we handle prompt injection.

name: Tom Albright
title: CTO
memory_summary: Infra-focused, skeptical of GPT wrappers. Engaged on the security middleware angle.

name: Rachel Fernandez
title: Head of Growth
memory_summary: Sales-led B2B SaaS at 4M ARR. Said their SDR team is the bottleneck. Booked a follow-up demo.

name: David Park
title: Co-Founder
memory_summary: AI writing tool. Curious about how we handle hallucination in lead-research.

name: Hannah Reyes
title: VP Sales
memory_summary: Big Apollo user. Said her team would pay just for the chain-builder if we strip everything else.

name: Eduardo Silva
title: CEO
memory_summary: Mid-stage Portuguese AI startup. Recent layoff at competitor opened a hiring window for them.

name: Aisha Khan
title: Founder
memory_summary: Pushed to HubSpot last Tuesday — closing on a 40k USD pilot. Wanted Brain transparency before signing.

name: Liam O'Connor
title: Head of Product
memory_summary: Product-led growth focus. Said sales team is 1 person — every minute saved matters.

name: Nora Bachmann
title: Co-Founder
memory_summary: Just shipped a hardware AI device. Trying to figure out enterprise outbound — fits us perfectly.

name: Carlos Mendez
title: CEO
memory_summary: GPU-cloud reseller. Open to outbound automation but worried about brand-safety on cold reach.

name: Priya Sharma
title: Founder
memory_summary: Said no interest — building outbound in-house. Politely closed the door.
